title: crotalaria pellita var. ramnadensis
intro: Crotalaria pellita var. ramnadensis is a plant species belonging to the legume family, known for its medicinal and herbal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Crotalaria pellita var. ramnadensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
